title: Building Enterprise Applications with .NET Core
content: Share insights on architecting scalable enterprise applications using .NET Core, focusing on clean architecture, design patterns, and best practices.

title: Angular Best Practices for Large-Scale Applications
content: Guide on managing large Angular applications, including state management, performance optimization, and code organization strategies.

title: Getting Started with RAG and LLMs
content: Introduction to Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines, vector databases, and building LLM-powered applications.

title: Leveraging Groq API for Fast AI Inference
content: Practical guide on using Groq API for rapid LLM inference, integration patterns, and real-world applications.
